comment: greedy-bot band for --sim 5000 (make sim). RE-BASELINED in batch 11 (the complete-ogre + heal-scarcity combat-balance MAJOR; human sign-off 2026-07-22/23). Greedy is the too-dumb floor-of-competence reference (only fights what blocks its beeline, no retreat/heal-timing/routing). In the now-hard game it almost never wins: 33/5000 = 0.7%, win_pct 0 — the honest, intended consequence of tuning COMPETENT violence to a coin flip (tactical 46.8%): a far worse player wins far less. deaths_dark 6 (a minority vs deaths_combat 4961 — the structural deaths_dark<deaths_combat check still holds), stuck 0, spared 192 (incidental awe-spares while routing). Band brackets the collapse with headroom to catch a difficulty REGRESSION (greedy suddenly winning several percent again would mean the game got easy). Full final tuning values are documented in tests/tactical-band.json's comment. Prior baseline for the record: batch 7 measured 849/5000 (17.0%), band [10,25]/deaths_dark [2,40]. Re-baselining is a balance change requiring human sign-off (granted for this batch). Calibrated for 5000 seeds.
